updf2md.description: Universal Markdown conversion endpoint for MCP tools and AI agents. It converts public PDF URLs or ticker symbols into agent-ready Markdown, returning OCR/layout metadata for PDFs and report context for ticker-based workflows.

mode.description: Optional mode selector: pdf or ticker.

pdf_url.description: Publicly reachable HTTP(S) URL of the PDF document to convert to Markdown.

ticker.description: Ticker, asset symbol, company name, or project name to turn into a Markdown investment report.

filename.description: Optional filename to send to the backend when the URL has no useful PDF name.

summary.description: Short summary returned for ticker-based report generation.

sources.description: Source URLs used for ticker-based report generation.

pdf_type.description: PDF classification such as text_based or scanned.

processing_time_ms.description: Time spent in the backend converter in milliseconds.

uimage.description: URL2AI ERNIE Image API for AI agents and MCP workflows. Generates an image from text, a public URL, or an X post URL using ERNIE-Image-Turbo.

input_type.description: One of text, url, or x_post.

text.description: Direct text input for image generation.

url.description: Publicly reachable HTTP(S) URL to summarize into an image prompt.

tweet_url.description: X post URL when using x_post mode.

input_type.description: Resolved input type used for generation.

prompt.description: Final prompt sent to the image backend.

image_base64.description: Generated image bytes encoded as base64.

output_format.description: Image format such as png or jpeg.
